description: A dedicated hunting vessel commissioned by the veteran Master Tetha-Eiko in 480 FSC for deeper frontier ventures following Makosso-Warra colonization, the Routier-class is made to support an aggressive lifestyle while still fulfilling the self-sufficient tenants of the Militia. A crew of 8 can comfortably live off a small interior garden and any hunts that the Montagne may deign to go on, while comfortable quarters allow the crew to slow down and relax when not on a planet. A sizeable armory allows the vessels Montagne to quarry nearly any frontier fauna. Despite that, the design has its detractors due to a reduced focus on this self-sufficiency. The reliablity of the armory and comfortable-enough aesthetics still draw a loyal cadre of experienced hunters to the vessel.
